caption: A man with dark skin and glasses is speaking during a podcast recording, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bowtie, tan suspenders, and a distinctive tall, spiked silver wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits before a black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small framed photographs and various clothing items, including a "LEE" branded garment. On-screen graphics include a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands. His expression shifts as he talks, and by the final frame, he is seen moving his right hand in a gesturing motion while continuing to speak.
